theme.description: Premium multinational enterprise IT services, drawing inspiration from Tata Elxsi. Authority, cleanliness, vast white space, rigorous grid structure.

colors.usage_rules: Never use dark text on dark backgrounds. Primary (#071C38) sections must use white/light text. Contrast ratio must exceed APCA standards.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#071C38] (or White if dark bg)

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Prioritize optical alignment and left-aligned headings. Avoid center-everything layouts.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling (Lenis style), fade-up staggers for grid items (duration: 0.6s, stagger: 0.1s).
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Card hover: -translate-y-2, shadow-lg, subtle border color shift to #00AEEF. Button ripple effect.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Icon scaling on hover (1.1x), animated numbers in stats counters, image zoom on blog cards.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00AEEF] hover:bg-[#0090C0] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors data-testid='btn-primary'
buttons.secondary: border border-[#071C38] text-[#071C38] hover:bg-[#071C38] hover:text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors data-testid='btn-secondary'

cards.service_glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-8 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300
cards.industries_card: Relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl h-64 group. Dark gradient overlay bottom-up. White Poppins text. Background image scales on hover.
cards.blog_card: Vertical layout. Top half: Image with overflow hidden. Bottom half: bg-white p-6. Meta tags in #00AEEF. H3 Poppins title.

components.icons: Lucide React icons with w-8 h-8 scaling, often paired with a subtle background circle (bg-[#F7F9FC] or bg-[#071C38]/5) for visual weight. Use custom SVGs for complex architectural diagrams.
components.navigation: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-transparent transition-all duration-300. On scroll -> bg-[#071C38]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 text-white.

section_blueprint.name: Navigation
section_blueprint.layout: Flexbox between logo (left) and links+CTA (right). Sticky, modern, transparent to glassmorphic on scroll.

section_blueprint.name: Hero
section_blueprint.layout: 100vh relative. Dark overlay bg-[#071C38]/70. Left content: Large H1 + intro + scroll indicator. Right content: Glassmorphic 'Book Service' form. Floating tech shapes.

section_blueprint.name: Our Speciality
section_blueprint.layout: 3-column grid (Desktop AMC, Laptop AMC, Network AMC). Service glass cards. Alternating height or staggered top margin to break pure symmetry.

section_blueprint.name: What We Offer
section_blueprint.layout: Grid layout (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5). 10 minimalist feature blocks. Icons top, Inter body text below. Heavy whitespace.

section_blueprint.name: Free Site Visit CTA
section_blueprint.layout: Full width bleed. Deep navy #071C38 background, diagonal subtle tech pattern. Left: text. Right: Accent #00AEEF button.

section_blueprint.name: Trending Services
section_blueprint.layout: 9 items. 3x3 grid. Card background white, thin border-slate-100. Hover reveals a right arrow and lifts the card.

section_blueprint.name: AMC Services
section_blueprint.layout: 5 enterprise tiers. Horizontal scroll container on mobile, flex grid on desktop. Central tier scaled up with #00AEEF border.

section_blueprint.name: Industries We Serve
section_blueprint.layout: 10 industries. Grid of 'industries_card' styles with background images and gradient overlays.

section_blueprint.name: CTA Banner
section_blueprint.layout: High contrast banner inside a container (rounded-2xl). bg-gradient-to-r from-[#071C38] to-[#00AEEF].

section_blueprint.name: Blog Listing
section_blueprint.layout: Grid of blog cards. Article page layout: max-w-3xl mx-auto, large hero image, H1 Poppins, Inter body text with leading-loose, drop-caps.

section_blueprint.name: Contact
section_blueprint.layout: 2-column split. Left: Form. Right: Contact details (Phone, Email, WhatsApp, Map snippet).

section_blueprint.name: Footer
section_blueprint.layout: Massive py-20. bg-[#071C38] text-white/70. 4-column link structure + Newsletter capture. Client logo marquee above footer.

hero_background.description: A robotic hand reaching into a digital network on a blue background, symbolizing AI technology and enterprise IT.

enterprise_office.description: Professional business team collaborating in a modern office meeting.

data_center.description: Modern office setup with IT monitors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: Primary #071C38, Accent #00AEEF, Background #F7F9FC.
Use Poppins for all headings with tracking-tight. Use Inter for body text.
Ensure the hero has a 100vh height with a dark overlay to maintain text readability over the tech background image.
Do NOT center align everything. Use left alignment for headings and dense text to mimic Tata Elxsi's professional corporate style.
Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms for testing.
Implement Lucide-react for all standard icons, size them consistently (w-6 h-6 usually).
Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered fade-ups and hover lifts on the cards.
Do NOT use Bootstrap. Use strict Tailwind classes with generous padding (p-8, p-12).
